extract: Azurill (Japanese: ルリリ Ruriri) is a dual-type Normal/Fairy baby Pokémon introduced in Generation III. Prior to Generation VI, it was a pure Normal-type Pokémon. It evolves into Marill when leveled up with high friendship, which evolves into Azumarill starting at level 18. Azurill, along with Wailmer and Kecleon, was one of the first Generation III Pokémon revealed, on March 7, 2001.
